About Me
Product
Marketer
With 2 years of hands-on Product Marketing experience in Edtech, I specialize in go-to-market execution, organic growth, and translating consumer insights into campaigns that drive real revenue. Before marketing full-time, I spent a year in customer-facing consulting — building deep understanding of buyer behavior that now shapes how I position every product.

01
Case Study 01
YouPass Bootcamp
GTM from Zero
Intensive IELTS prep · Built from scratch · 605M VND in pilot phase
The Problem
E-learning revenue plateaued despite funnel optimization. User interviews revealed one key insight: learners buy when exam day is close.
The Answer
Repackage existing content into an intensive prep program — with mentorship, personalized paths, and a retake guarantee to reduce purchase risk.
My Role
Led marketing end-to-end and owned the full student journey from first touchpoint to post-exam results. Coordinated across Academic, Mentor, Tech, Finance, and Creative.

02
Case Study 02
IELTS Insights
From Channel Ceiling to ×16
Monthly e-magazine · Distribution strategy · 8,067 downloads/issue
The Problem
Downloads stuck at 500–600/issue. Owned Facebook channels capped reach at existing followers — no path to new audiences.
The Insight
IELTS learners were on TikTok and Threads — platforms distributing by content relevance, not follower count. Ideal for top-of-funnel reach.
What I Did
Owned full production cycle and adapted magazine content into platform-native formats — building channels from scratch to expand reach beyond existing audience.
BeforeAfter
📘 Facebook only📱 Facebook + TikTok + Threads
📥 ~500/issue📥 8,067/issue (×16)
📚 Static e-book only🎥 Video + Voice + Carousel
Downloads per Issue (Vol 9 → Vol 20)

03
Case Study 03
Organic Seeding
Zero Budget. Repeatable Growth.
Threads & TikTok · Viral playbook · 870K views personal record
The Challenge
Grow brand awareness on Threads and TikTok with zero paid budget — and make results repeatable at team scale.
What I Did
As PIC, I studied platform behavior, tested formats, and built a viral formula updated continuously with trends. Designed the team's weekly content strategy, led execution, and owned the collective results.

04
Case Study 04
YouPass PRO &
Listening Builder Launch
Feature launch · UGC activation · Revenue growth
Context
Listening Builder is a core feature of YouPass PRO. Launching the feature drove new trials and converted users to the PRO tier — directly contributing to revenue growth.
Campaign (2–3 weeks)
Designed a minigame activating 135 UGC product reviews on Threads. Ran YouPass Challenge — 50 users maintained 7-day streaks, generating 350 organic posts.
17K+

E-learning
A/B Testing & Revenue Growth
